"desc":"This is an app which you can use in different different occassions to wish or greet somebody with good messages. You can greet someone with good thoughts or can wish somebody in different style.I have also added here rivetting jokes,quotes and slogans that are spoken by famous dignitaries or politicians. You can send greetings to someone as drawable or as normal text or by encrypted format as QR.Memory occupancy of this app in KB and you can cache some good thoughts or greetings in the app memory as well.",

"desc":"This is the quiz app. Here I have added multiple quizzes of different technology topics and languages. "desc":"It's a video playing app that pause the screen play as eyes turned off and resume playing it as u open your eyes.Here video play/pause is controlled by our eyes movement.In this app, you can streamed youtube videos online from within the app in the normal mode and has some special eye movement feature .In AI mode, if you are not watching the screen or your eyes are off than in that case video will get paused.It will only be played when your eyes are on and you are watching the screen.You can also filter your search item from the list , share the app link with another app/person view source code of all those apps and also to download the APK/ZIP files of the apps.",
